name_cn:
New Arrival 🎉Bonnie🎉1BG628🎉🎉
This retro leather bag embodies a refined yet modern personality. The geometric silhouette features modern metal buckles and side laces. The long handle reflects a practical and casual attitude. Equipped with a detachable long shoulder strap for versatile styling, it offers ample capacity. Super practical 👍👍 A must-have for fashionistas. Get this retro tote home now 🎉🎉
32x17.5x10.5cm🎉🎉🎉
